channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐹 432539/gpt2api (1566 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: 432539

📝 Repository: 432539/gpt2api

📄 Descrizione: 基于 chatgpt.com 逆向的 OpenAI 兼容 SaaS 网关 · GPT-IMAGE-2 稳定 · 批量出图 · 多账号池 · 高并发调度 · 积分计费 ·

⭐ Stelle: 1566

🍴 Forks: 390

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: chatgpt gpt-image-2 openai

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-18T06:02:44Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-17T05:29:07Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 Kianmhz/GooseRelayVPN (1229 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Kianmhz

📝 Repository: Kianmhz/GooseRelayVPN

📄 Descrizione: Socks5 VPN that tunnels raw TCP through Google Apps Script to your VPS exit server (AES‑256‑GCM, domain‑fronted).

⭐ Stelle: 1229

🍴 Forks: 175

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: aes-gcm mitm proxy sni socks5 tunneling vpn

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-26T05:17:43Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-23T04:53:05Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 alash3al/stash (699 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: alash3al

📝 Repository: alash3al/stash

📄 Descrizione: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required.

⭐ Stelle: 699

🍴 Forks: 31

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: ai ai-agents ai-memory memory

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-22T06:12:03Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📝 Repository: ajavadinezhad/zyrln

item.title: 🐹 IRNova/Nova-Proxy-App (633 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: IRNova

📝 Repository: IRNova/Nova-Proxy-App

📄 Descrizione: نوا پروکسی - ابزار پروکسی محلی قدرتمند با قابلیت‌های GSA (Google Apps Script) با Domain Fronting، تکه‌تکه‌سازی TLS، تزریق ECH، بازپخش QUIC، MITM و مسیریابی هوشمند. طراحی شده برای عبور از فیلترینگ سنگین و DPI پیشرفته.

⭐ Stelle: 633

🍴 Forks: 95

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: No license

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-23T05:13:50Z

item.title: 🐹 ZhiYi-R/moon-bridge (280 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ZhiYi-R

📝 Repository: ZhiYi-R/moon-bridge

📄 Descrizione: Moon Bridge 是一个用 Go 编写的协议转换与模型路由代理。对外暴露 OpenAI Responses API（/v1/responses），对内支持 Anthropic Messages、Google Gemini（GenAI）、OpenAI Chat Completions 等多种上游协议。客户端指定不同模型别名时，自动将请求路由到对应上游 Provider 并在协议间自动转换。

⭐ Stelle: 280

🍴 Forks: 44

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-25T06:49:32Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-23T05:33:51Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: dgr8akki

📝 Repository: dgr8akki/nano-ffmpeg

📄 Descrizione: nano-ffmpeg wraps the full power of ffmpeg in a beautiful, keyboard-driven terminal dashboard. No more googling flags. Browse your files, pick what you want to do, tweak settings with presets, and watch a live progress bar while it encodes.

📄 Descrizione: GooseRelayVPN Android client: a SOCKS5 VPN with profile-based setup, live logs, and JSON import/export that tunnels raw TCP through Google Apps Script to your VPS exit server (AES-256-GCM, domain-fronted).
